message:
refactor(tests,bd-t545x): consolidate 3 near-duplicate seed_codex_session fixtures

Pre-consolidation: three Codex-session JSONL seeders lived in
cli_robot.rs, e2e_health.rs, and e2e_lexical_fail_open.rs with
near-identical bodies — same `sessions/2026/04/23/` path layout,
same ts_ms=1_714_000_000_000, same session_meta payload shape, same
response_item wrapper. The ONLY semantic difference was whether an
assistant response line was appended; variants differed cosmetically
in .unwrap() vs .expect(), a locally-declared iso_ts() closure, and
inline vs module-level definitions.

Moved the canonical version into tests/util/mod.rs:
  pub fn seed_codex_session(
      codex_home: &Path,
      filename: &str,
      keyword: &str,
      include_assistant: bool,
  )

Callers now shim through:
- cli_robot.rs::seed_codex_session_s0cmk → util::seed_codex_session(..., false)
  (user-only corpus)
- e2e_health.rs::seed_codex_session_cold_start → util::seed_codex_session(..., true)
  (user + assistant)
- e2e_lexical_fail_open.rs::seed_codex_session → util::seed_codex_session(..., true)

The shims keep the bead-specific function names so existing tests'
call sites don't churn. e2e_lexical_fail_open.rs's iso_ts() helper
was inlined into the util version (used only by its own seeder),
and `serde_json::json` import narrowed to serde_json::Value.
e2e_health.rs gained a `mod util;` line; the other two files
already had one (cli_robot.rs from ju50o, e2e_lexical_fail_open.rs
new).

Preserved: the important rollout- filename prefix documentation
(franken_agent_detection silently skips non-prefixed files per
connectors/codex.rs::is_rollout_file — hit in ibuuh.10 series)
now lives in one authoritative place at tests/util/mod.rs.

Scope note: tests/atomic_swap_publish_crash_window.rs:61 also
defines a seed_codex_session but with a different signature
(additional args), deferred rather than forced into the shared
helper.

Validation: cargo check --tests passes; cargo fmt --check clean.
Net: +71 LOC in util, -114 LOC across three tests.

Closes coding_agent_session_search-t545x.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
